copilot_dispatch_reason: 14 focus surfaces all small-to-medium; 10 targeted grep + Read passes gave full coverage. Dispatching gpt-5.4 high would add latency without new signal.

findings.title: Anchor slug drift after (Level 3 Only) -> (Any Level) rename
findings.description: Two files renamed the H2 heading to '(Any Level)' but retained the old anchor ID `optional-templates-level-3-only`. Any deep link or auto-ToC slug-matcher targeting the new title will miss. Rename anchor ID to `optional-templates-any-level` for both.
findings.fix_suggestion: Rename ANCHOR id to `optional-templates-any-level` (open and close tags) in both files. No heading change needed; title already reads 'OPTIONAL TEMPLATES (Any Level)'.

findings.title: Level 2 folder-tree diagrams omit optional resource-map.md
findings.description: §5 Level 2 tree (level_specifications.md:193-200) and parallel tree in template_mapping.md:194-200 do not show `resource-map.md`, while the Level 3 tree does (lines 211-221 and 209-221 respectively). Prose Optional Files subsection at L2 correctly lists it, so tree is inconsistent with prose. Minor: Level 1 tree (lines 174-180) similarly omits it.
findings.fix_suggestion: Add `└── resource-map.md  (OPTIONAL - lean path catalog)` to Level 1 and Level 2 ASCII trees.

findings.title: Four distinct phrasings used to describe resource-map.md across surfaces
findings.description: No canonical one-liner is enforced. The four variants are semantically compatible: (a) 'Optional lean path catalog (any level)', (b) 'lean path catalog (cross-cutting, see §9)', (c) 'lean, scannable catalog of every path analyzed, created, updated, or removed', (d) 'Lean path catalog of every file analyzed/created/updated/removed'. No finding — recorded for future style-guide hardening.

questions_answered.q1_wording_consistency_across_13_surface: Semantically consistent across 4 phrasings. No contradictions. No canonical one-liner required.
questions_answered.q2_stale_8_doc_tables_without_resource_m: None. All sentinel matches of 'handover.md, debug-delegation.md' co-occur with 'resource-map.md' in the same row or list.
questions_answered.q3_skill_md_rule_9_toc_forbidden_list: Correctly includes resource-map.md at SKILL.md:842 and mirrored in template_guide.md:745 and SKILL.md:872 success-criteria check.
questions_answered.q5_template_mapping_title_change_coheren: Table at 155-158 and tree at 220 align with new '(Any Level)' title. One remaining issue: anchor ID at 150/168 still reflects old title (see SD-001).
questions_answered.q6_quick_reference_four_level_coverage: Yes — lines 41-44 list resource-map.md as optional at all four levels. Correct.
questions_answered.q7_stale_canonical_N_enumerations_missed: None found. Searched for 'canonical 8/9', '8-doc', 'nine canonical', etc. Packet 003 test assertion CONFIGS.length=11 already reflects new cardinality (validated iteration 03).
